reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' workload, pay and professional autonomy
reactions.public_good_frame: no reform succeeds that its teachers cannot carry
reactions.argument: Fairer admissions are acceptable if they add no unpaid administrative burden on schools.
reactions.condition_to_change: No new reporting duties without paid time.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' workload, pay and professional autonomy
reactions.public_good_frame: no reform succeeds that its teachers cannot carry
reactions.argument: A phase-down is bearable only with retraining guarantees and no forced redundancies.
reactions.condition_to_change: Enforceable teacher guarantees written into the law.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' workload, pay and professional autonomy
reactions.public_good_frame: no reform succeeds that its teachers cannot carry
reactions.argument: Restructuring the whole system during a teacher shortage overloads the very people who must deliver it.
reactions.condition_to_change: Settle pay and workload first; then structural reform becomes discussable.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' workload, pay and professional autonomy
reactions.public_good_frame: no reform succeeds that its teachers cannot carry
reactions.argument: Resources flowing to general schools directly improve working conditions where most teachers work.
reactions.condition_to_change: Compensation must reach salaries and staffing, not only buildings.
